test: DeepEP V2 tests/elastic/test_ep.py (torchrun-native wrapper, first EP mode case)
topology: 2x p5en.48xlarge H200 (16 ranks, EP16), cross-node over EFA
transport: NCCL-GIN v2 CPU-proxy (NCCL_GIN_TYPE=2, OFI_NCCL_GIN_GDAKI=0), aws-ofi-nccl 9c44 v1-fallback plugin (gdrdrv-2.4 nodes)

efa_proof: NCCL log: 'Selected provider is efa, fabric is efa-direct (found 16 nics)' all ranks; scaleout ~5 GB/s per rank measured by kineto. Pod sysfs exposes no hw_counters (tx_bytes check impossible in-pod).
